name: WordPress SEO-optimized post generator
description: Researches a keyword using Exa, uses Claude to write an SEO-optimized blog post with title, meta description, and structured content, then publishes it to WordPress as a draft post.

source.originalName: Automate SEO-Optimized WordPress posts with AI & Google Sheets

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for keyword research

keyword.description: Target SEO keyword or topic for the blog post

tone.description: Writing tone: professional, casual, authoritative, friendly

wordCount.description: Target word count for the article

steps.name: Research keyword and top-ranking content via Exa
Build Claude prompt for SEO blog post
Run Claude AI for SEO blog post generation
Publish SEO post to WordPress as draft
